title: Shared Definitions Document/Checklist
notes:
Drafted shared definitions covering heartbeat colors, narrative lenses, beat types. 
 Scope: Create a governance structure for heartbeat definitions.
 Acceptance Criteria: Document must be peer-reviewed and approved by all stakeholders.
 Dependencies: Requires feedback from Scout, Solara, and Sage on initial drafts.

title: Progress Timeline/Feed Implementation
notes:
Work on implementing progress timeline and feed has started. 
 Scope: Establish the environment and UI components for the progress timeline feed.
 Acceptance Criteria: Timeline must reflect real-time updates and manage user inputs.
 Dependencies: Needs backend support for data retrieval from Firestore.

title: Kanban Color Logic + Idle Triggers
notes:
Wiring up the Kanban logic with the idle trigger settings. 
 Scope: Implement the logic for Kanban colors and idle trigger functionality.
 Acceptance Criteria: Successful integration of color logic within user interface and functional triggers.
 Dependencies: Requires input on color semantics from the heartbeat definitions document.

title: Hourly Tracker Automation
notes:
Initiating automation for the hourly tracker. 
 Scope: Automate the data collection process for hourly tracking.
 Acceptance Criteria: Tracker must accurately log hours and integrate with overall performance metrics.
 Dependencies: Coordination with backend services to ensure data integrity and flow.
